sections.paragraph:
Original: קפא

Transliteration: qâphâ'

Phonetic: kaw-faw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to thicken, condense, congeal, settle, become dense (verb)
    1. (Qal) to be condensed
      1. thickening (participle)
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to curdle
  2. congelation (noun masculine)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2048,2048a

Part(s) of speech:
